findings.evidence: `NormalSubgroupFiberQuotient.lean:266-272` mentions only `Subgroup.normalizerQuotientMk`, `Subgroup.normalizer_eq_top`, and `QuotientGroup.mk`; `Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean:269-280` already has the generic normal-case comparison lemmas used by the proof.
findings.fix: Move/prove the general lemma in `TauCeti/Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean`, e.g. for any group `G`, normal `H : Subgroup G`, and `g k : G`, comparing `normalizerQuotientMk H ⟨g, by simp [Subgroup.normalizer_eq_top]⟩` with `QuotientGroup.mk' H g`; derive the inverse deck statement as a specialization if needed.
findings.issue: `normalizerQuotientMk_inv_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_inv_eq` is purely algebraic but is specialized to `Deck p` and inverse representatives.

summary: The base-orbit criterion is now at the natural cancellative-action level, but the new normalizer quotient equality criterion is still stated as a deck/inverse special case of a purely algebraic fact.
